reviews.comment:
Tuve una mala experiencia hace unos años y no compro más en esa estación de servicio. Se aprovechan de que es una parada obligada y que hay abundancia de público .

(Translated by Google)
I had a bad experience a few years ago and I won't buy gas at that station again. They take advantage of the fact that it's a popular stop and there are always lots of customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdVktUm1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
El café es bastante malo, te lo sirven quemado y tibio. Lamentablemente no es casual porque ya nos pasó en reiteradas ocasiones

(Translated by Google)
The coffee is pretty bad; they serve it burnt and lukewarm. Unfortunately, it's not a coincidence because it's happened to us repeatedly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMmJIM253RRAB
